# Add UI/Compose tests for RunMapView and polish RunMapView visuals

Context

`RunMapView.kt` uses OSMdroid inside AndroidView. Add UI tests and polish visuals.

Checklist

- [ ] Add UI/instrumentation tests to validate polyline drawing and centering.
- [ ] Polish stroke width, polyline color, start/end markers, and zoom behavior.
- [ ] Add a replay mode design to allow stepping through history.

Files to inspect

- `app/src/main/java/com/example/productivityapp/ui/run/RunMapView.kt`
